message:
feat: Implement dynamic import registry, AST executor context, and float.hex()

- dynamic_import.zig: Add ModuleRegistry for runtime module lookup
- dynamic_import.zig: Add registerModule() and moduleExists() functions
- ast_executor.zig: Add ExecutionContext with locals/globals dictionaries
- ast_executor.zig: Implement executeName() with context lookup and builtins
- float_ops.zig: Implement floatToHex() with proper IEEE 754 parsing
- float_ops.zig: Handle special cases (nan, inf, zero) correctly
- float_ops.zig: Generate Python-compatible hex format (0x1.hhhhp+e)
